name: Csl Limited
analysis: CSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 60% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$106.5400, stop A$89.1000, target A$126.4900 (1.14:1) — then trail it.
